name: zero-to-launch
description: RP7O's agentic toolkit: plugins, skills, and workflows for product development — from kickoff to architecture, code generation, and release.

plugins.name: maker
plugins.description: Product development companion for building software projects. Use when someone wants to start a new project, explore an idea, make technical decisions, generate code, run quality gates, or iterate on an existing project. Supports frontend apps, APIs, static sites, and fullstack projects.

plugins.name: shaper
plugins.description: Business strategy and validation companion. Helps validate ideas, build lean canvases, research markets, and define product briefs before engineering begins. Use when evaluating a new idea, building a pitch, or running a Go/No-Go gate.
